sources.excerpt: Official homepage identifies Blue Ridge Seafood Restaurant at 15704 Lee Hwy, Gainesville, Virginia.
Current HTML menu contains seafood steam pots, specials, appetizers, soups and salads, sandwiches, tacos, classics, seafood, land items, baskets, sides, desserts, and kids menu.
Restaurant-issued PDF menu surface; no allergen matrix located.
Official instructions describe water, beer or wine, seasoning, culinary bags, seafood, shrimp, and potatoes; no allergen matrix.
Official page states online ordering is limited to listed menu items and links to ordering.
Endpoint returned HTTP 403 during current inspection; no usable vendor catalog or allergen disclosure was available.
Search surfaced official homepage, current menu, menu PDFs, kids menu, and steam-pot instructions; no official allergen matrix.
